title: taraxacum subtenuiforme
intro: Taraxacum subtenuiforme, also known as the lesser creeping dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Taraxacum subtenuiforme can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for consumption, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
